signals.headline: Trump Announces Two-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of 8 p
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Two-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of 8 p.m. Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump announced Tuesday evening that the U.S. reached a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran, averting escalation just before an 8 p.m. ET deadline amid threats over the Strait of Hormuz closure.[1]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY (Released April 2) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but undershot market forecasts of 2.4%; core inflation eased to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][2] This data, released on April 2 by the Ministry of Data and Statistics, showed monthly CPI up 0.3% (below 0.6% expected), with petroleum up

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rate at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate at 2.5% (April 10 Decision) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Bank of Korea unanimously kept its benchmark rate at 2.5% for the 7th month on April 10, citing inflation above 2% target (recently 2.2%), rising oil prices, weak won (1,520/USD), and growth below 2% forecast; no easing signaled despite prior March data.[5][6] BOK now expects headline inflation to exceed prior 2.2%
